creator: jdc@koitsu.org
text:
I believe this problem was reported on freebsd-stable about a month ago.  The thread involves a conversation with the committer (eadler@), who due to hardware issues lacks commit capability right now.

Thread: https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2018-July/thread.html#89269
Initial post: https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2018-July/089269.html

Another committer in the FreeBSD Project needs to pick this up ASAP; at bare minimum as a break-fix, revert r335693.  Mark, can you possibly find someone with src-commit who can do this?
